# Transcript — Session 2

When the interviewer asked the user about their design workflow, they mentioned using Figma daily.

The participant explained that they prefer working in sprints. The moderator noted that the team structure matters.

The user described their process as iterative. When the interviewer probed further about design tools, 
the participant discussed how they structure feedback sessions.

No personal identifying information was collected in this session.
The respondent preferred to remain anonymous throughout.
